title: Shrinking the OxCaml js_of_ocaml bundle: 285 MB to 4 MB
summary: This post discusses reducing the OxCaml js_of_ocaml bundle size from 285 MB to 4 MB, likely through dead code elimination, tree-shaking, and optimizing OCaml-to-JavaScript compilation. It highlights practical techniques for minimizing deployment artifacts in OCaml web applications.
